task_completion.description: Log in to the Moodle application as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle dashboard or site administration page is visible, and the user profile in the top right indicates the user is logged in as an administrator (e.g., 'Admin User').

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Automated backup setup page in Site administration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the 'Automated backup setup' page under Site administration > Courses > Backups.

task_completion.description: Enable the automated backups and set the schedule to Saturday and Sunday at 03:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Active' setting is set to 'Enabled'. The checkboxes for 'Saturday' and 'Sunday' are checked under 'Schedule'. The 'Execute at' dropdowns are set to '03' for hours and '00' for minutes.

task_completion.description: Set the storage type to a specified directory and enter the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Automated backup storage' dropdown is set to 'Specified directory for automated backups'. The 'Save to...' text input field contains exactly '/var/moodledata/backups_auto'.

task_completion.description: Configure the retention policy to keep the last 4 backups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Maximum number of backups kept' field or dropdown is set to '4'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the system is configured to skip hidden courses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Skip hidden courses' checkbox is checked or the corresponding dropdown is set to 'Yes'.
A success message such as 'Changes saved' is visible, or the browser shows the configuration page reloading with all the newly entered settings preserved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Moodle web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Moodle UI, rather than a terminal window executing SQL commands or PHP scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actively interacted with the form elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show dropdowns being expanded, checkboxes being clicked, and text being typed into the Moodle settings form, rather than just viewing a text file with the instructions.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database management tool to alter the configuration directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database administration tools (like phpMyAdmin or a MySQL CLI) are visible in the screenshots; all configuration is done through the Moodle Site Administration pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following exact values in the Moodle UI: 1) The backup path must be exactly '/var/moodledata/backups_auto'. 2) The retention value (Maximum number of backups kept) must be set to '4'. 3) The execution time must be set to 03:00 (hour 3 in 24-hour format). 4) The storage type must be set to 'Specified directory for automated backups'.
